textByHashes.a2a48eb41697629f05d80181b01c3130a34b8ffc: Why are there zombies all over the place? Is this normal in Misthalin?
textByHashes.15419e29c73050964dfa2720bd1add2922944058: Well I hope they get removed soon. This isn't very safe.
textByHashes.1eba95468869aa1347302baf89766c1aae3bc020: Well, I'd prefer to wait it out, but if someone doesn't deal with these things soon, I may have to.
textByHashes.140e036d28fe57c464f5841f043300d7fc23f6e2: Well, in theory, but he always seems to be busy.
textByHashes.5b325c40cf702b9d0b889dab2e2b80f4d93dc4fd: Oh no, I like travelling, and if you become a diplomat patience is a vital skill.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
